programme.title: The Repair Shop: On the Road
programme.desc: Chris restores a secret journal from Captain Cook's first voyage, while upholster Ray revives a chair belonging to Trevor Baylis, inventor of the wind-up radio.

programme.desc: Dr Eric Knowles will see you, as he looks back at some of the most profitable medical purchases on the show down the years.

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Contestants compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

programme.title: The Tournament
programme.desc: Eight contestants compete in a series of fast-paced quiz battles in an attempt to eliminate their opponents from the day's game and walk away with a cash prize.

programme.title: Chess Masters: The Endgame
programme.desc: The four remaining players from the second heat face a memory puzzle set by chess superstar and world number one Magnus Carlsen.

programme.title: Clive Myrie's Italian Roadtrip
programme.desc: Staying in what was one of Naples' poorest neighbourhoods, in a hotel that's also an art gallery, Clive discovers how this always-colourful city is changing for the better. As a big fan of opera, Clive is also excited to join the cast of the Teatro San Carlo opera house in the run up to their opening night, and while in the costume department, he just can't resist trying a few things on.

programme.title: Serengeti
programme.desc: All around is a blackened smoking wasteland, the aftermath of the huge fire. Torrential rain brings hope and the land is reborn into a green paradise as water quenches the scorched earth. Mirroring the changes in the landscape, the cycle of death and rebirth comes to the fore as the Serengeti's elders prepare their young for adulthood and a life on their own.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In addition to more finds at Knebworth House, there are also some unseen finds from previous episodes. This edition comes from Knebworth House in Hertfordshire and features a pair of revealing female figures originally displayed in a French brothel, an unusual table clock with a floating turtle which tells the time, a chemist's mortar dating from 1573 and a Victorian toilet given as a present.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: The team are at the RAF Museum in Cosford, Shropshire. Antiques experts Claire Rawle and Jonathan Pratt are on hand to find a selection of objects to take to auction. Claire comes across a rare Pelham Puppet, and Jonathan falls for a ladies silver fob watch. Paul Martin gets excited by iconic pop autographs and heads off to the nearby town of Dudley to find out about saddlemaking there from the First World War onwards.

programme.title: Richard Osman's House of Games
programme.desc: Former winners Amy Gledhill, Jacqui Joseph, Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen and Tim Vine test their general knowledge skills on this week's Richard Osman's House of Games: Champions.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for north east England and Yorkshire with canapes, starters and fish dishes inspired by the British film industry. Who will be eliminated?

programme.desc: Pantalone has in an audacious plan to steal a consignment of diamonds worth a tasty twelve million. But he's hired a complete bunch of double-crossing clowns to do it.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Featuring extensive coverage of the day's top national and international news stories, along with explanations about the context and potential aftereffects.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: After the murder of James shocks the world, John appears online in Islamic State videos, raising chilling questions about loyalty, coercion, and survival.

programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: This week, the candidates are off to the Isle of Wight to find nine items associated with the area, and the team that spends the least money on the correct items wins. Following a dismal performance on the same task in Hong Kong, it's a chance for the candidates to redeem themselves. A mad dash to the finish ensures a tight race, and Lord Sugar bids farewell to another candidate.

programme.title: The Apprentice: Unfinished Business

programme.title: WhatsApp Obsession: The Murder of Stephanie Hansen
programme.desc: On the 30th of December, 2022, 39-year-old Stephanie Hansen was brutally stabbed to death in her London home - her housemate and friend Sheldon Rodrigues initially appeared grief-stricken, yet behind his facade lay a chilling obsession. In the months before Stephanie's death, Rodrigues planted secret cameras and recording devices in their home and bombarded her with coercive WhatsApp messages - when Steph began a new relationship, his jealousy turned deadly. Through exclusive access to police bodycam footage, WhatsApp records and court evidence, this film reveals how the Metropolitan Police exposed Rodrigues' lies and uncovered the disturbing level of surveillance Steph was subjected to - featuring interviews with Steph's family, friends and the detectives who investigated the case, this powerful documentary unravels a story of obsession, control, and the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: WhatsApp Obsession: The Murder of Stephanie Hansen
programme.desc: On the 30th of December, 2022, 39-year-old Stephanie Hansen was brutally stabbed to death in her London home - her housemate and friend Sheldon Rodrigues initially appeared grief-stricken, yet behind his facade lay a chilling obsession. In the months before Stephanie's death, Rodrigues planted secret cameras and recording devices in their home and bombarded her with coercive WhatsApp messages - when Steph began a new relationship, his jealousy turned deadly. Through exclusive access to police bodycam footage, WhatsApp records and court evidence, this film reveals how the Metropolitan Police exposed Rodrigues' lies and uncovered the disturbing level of surveillance Steph was subjected to - featuring interviews with Steph's family, friends and the detectives who investigated the case, this powerful documentary unravels a story of obsession, control, and the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: The story of everyday life in a small and tightly-knit community - this is the core of the world's longest running primetime drama serial and the highest-rating programme in the UK. Coronation Street has for over 50 years uniquely combined cult status with popularity and durability - the quality of writing is second to none, portraying believable characters with a large helping of humour. Its themes - love, passion, deception, greed and intrigue - are ones which everyone can relate to.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The disappearance of a young boy at Denton Football Club leads Frost into a disturbing story of child abuse and paedophilia. In addition to the usual pressures in his life, Frost must also decide whether or not to accept a promotion to Chief Inspector.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Jeff Randall is confined to his bed. He has met with an accident - a fall from a balcony - and he's therefore a captive audience when Marty Hopkirk insists on telling of a case he handled entirely on his own, without mentioning it to Jeff, before he met his death and became a ghost. Jeff is forced to listen in disbelief to a remarkable spy drama which began with a telephone call asking for him.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: PC Nick Rowan investigates the strange case of the house-proud housebreaker, and Aidensfield has seen a spat of burglaries recently and in each one only silverware has been stolen. It's not until morning that the trio are discovered by a man delivering beer to the pub. Elsewhere, Greengrass told Nick that Dave Chapman is trading in stolen farm machinery.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Reg Manston has built up his pedigree herd through years of back-breaking work and now has to face losing it all. The outbreak is reported to Nick and he goes to investigate. programme.title: Doc Martin

Meanwhile, Al acts on some relationship advice from Bert but things go from bad to worse with Pauline.
